intended_use: RhythmAnalytics is a software application for the assessment of cardiac arrhythmias using single-lead ECG data in subjects over 18 years of age. It is intended for use by a healthcare solution integra
intended_use_full: RhythmAnalytics is a software application for the assessment of cardiac arrhythmias using single-lead ECG data in subjects over 18 years of age. It is intended for use by a healthcare solution integrator to build web or mobile applications to let qualified healthcare professionals review and confirm the analytic result.
other_metrics: Performance testing included evaluation of sensitivity, specificity, and positive and negative predictive values against a gold standard; all software validation testing met requirements.
